mundo.titulo: Celebrated British artist David Hockney dies aged 88
mundo.resumen: Hockney, one of the UK's most important and influential artists, has died at the age of 88.

mundo.titulo: Ministers want 60% of children walking or cycling to school by 2035
mundo.resumen: Thousands of safer paths and crossings are promised to help people become more active in England's towns and cities.

mundo.titulo: Grooming survivors left with criminal records still being failed, BBC told
mundo.resumen: Victims who were abused and prosecuted as children are still being failed, says grooming report author.

mundo.titulo: Donaldson denies meeting sex abuse accuser to 'nip in the bud' allegations
mundo.resumen: Sir Jeffrey Donaldson, the former Democratic Unionist Party (DUP) leader, is on trial for 18 sex abuse charges, including one count of rape, all of which he denies.

mundo.titulo: London council takes possession of property linked to Sierra Leone's First Lady
mundo.resumen: Southwark Council in south London takes possession of a property linked to Sierra Leone's Fatima Bio.

mundo.titulo: Taylor Swift makes tearful 21-minute speech as she joins Songwriters Hall of Fame
mundo.resumen: The singer thanks her family as she becomes the youngest woman to be inducted into the Hall of Fame.

negocios.titulo: Watch: Three things to know about SpaceX's stock market debut
negocios.resumen: The BBC's Samira Hussain explains everything you need to know about SpaceX's historic IPO.

negocios.titulo: UK economy contracts as Iran war impact felt
negocios.resumen: The economy shrank slightly in April as the Iran war began to have an impact on businesses, official data shows.

negocios.titulo: Why the economics make this the craziest World Cup ever
negocios.resumen: From trade wars to soaring ticket prices, the 2026 World Cup is unlike any before it. Faisal Islam explores what this tournament reveals about our changing global economy.

negocios.titulo: My friends always want to split the bill equally, how do I say no?
negocios.resumen: It is never easy to speak up when a fellow diner says "let's just divide it!"

negocios.titulo: India's 'blue gold' starts a new drinks industry
negocios.resumen: Agave plants grow wild in India and new distillers are using them to create a spirits industry.

negocios.titulo: Elon Musk's SpaceX raises $75bn ahead of world's biggest stock market launch
negocios.resumen: The public sale is also expected to make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.

tecnologia.titulo: SpaceX IPO: Everything you need to know
tecnologia.resumen: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

tecnologia.titulo: US surveillance law to expire for first time after lawmakers reject Trump’s controversial pick to lead spy agencies
tecnologia.resumen: The spy law known as Section 702, which authorizes the NSA and FBI's warrantless surveillance, will all but certainly expire on Friday for the first time.

tecnologia.titulo: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar’s video AI is built for India’s scale
tecnologia.resumen: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation

tecnologia.titulo: Equal AI raises $30M to screen calls so Indians don’t have to
tecnologia.resumen: Equal AI said that its AI-powered call assistant now has over a million monthly active users.

tecnologia.titulo: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
tecnologia.resumen: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

tecnologia.titulo: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
tecnologia.resumen: The new round values the physical AI startup that aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design at $41 billion.

tecnologia.titulo: Jeff Bezos’ AI startup aims to build an ‘artificial general engineer’
tecnologia.resumen: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos says his new AI startup will work toward developing an "artificial general engineer," according to reports from The New York Times and CNBC. The startup, called Prometheus, aims to develop AI-powered engineering tools to aid in the design of physical products. The NYT first reported on Prometheus last November, but now […]

SpaceX is now a publicly traded company. In one of the most highly anticipated and controversial public offerings of all time, the rocket venture helmed by Elon Musk started trading on Nasdaq on June 12th at the take-it-or-leave-it price of $135-per-share - though most retail investors will likely pay far more. The IPO is historic […]

tecnologia.titulo: BMW’s Neue Klasse M concept brings next-gen EV tech to motorsports
tecnologia.resumen: Just in time for Le Mans, BMW is pulling the cover off its new M performance concept built on the Bavarian automaker's Neue Klasse next-generation architecture. The concept is the debut of a new design language for BMW's M division, signaling a shift toward a more electrified future. The company says it is built on […]

tecnologia.titulo: The Nintendo DS is still the best gaming handheld for travel
tecnologia.resumen: Even with the looming specter of rising prices, there's never been a better time for portable gaming. The Steam Deck has ushered in a new era of handheld PCs, the Analogue Pocket and other Game Boy-style remakes are making retro games more approachable than ever, the Playdate has led to an alternate universe of weirdo […]

The sun is out, the sky is clear. It’s time to get outside and disconnect — from work, at least. This summer, we’re looking at all the ways to upgrade our free time indoors and out, from smart lights for the backyard to great gadgets to bring camping to ways to wind down at the local library.
